# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement advanced filtering capabilities for racquet exploration with multi-dimensional range controls, brand filtering, and dynamic search
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx (new)
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx (new) 
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Advanced Filtering System with:
- Multi-dimensional range sliders (weight, head size, power, control, etc.)
- Brand multi-select with search
- Dynamic search with autocomplete
- Filter persistence and URL state management
- Real-time results updating

## Definition of Done
- [x] Range sliders for numeric properties (weight, head size, ratings)
- [x] Multi-select brand filter with search functionality
- [x] Dynamic text search with autocomplete suggestions
- [x] Filter state management with custom hook
- [x] Integration with both 2D and 3D visualizations
- [x] URL state persistence for filters
- [x] Clear/reset filters functionality

## ✅ COMPLETED
**Status:** All filtering functionality implemented and integrated
**Files created:** 
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx  
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx
- src/components/filters/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts
**Integration:** Filters fully integrated with main page and visualizations

## ✅ COMPLETED: Racquet Comparison Feature with side-by-side analysis
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement side-by-side racquet comparison functionality with radar charts, detailed specifications, and performance analysis
**Files created:** 
- src/components/comparison/RacquetComparison.tsx
- src/components/comparison/RadarChart.tsx
- src/components/comparison/ComparisonTable.tsx
- src/components/comparison/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetComparison.ts

**Integration:** All comparison functionality integrated with main page and visualizations

## ✅ COMPLETED: Racquet Recommendation Engine with AI-powered suggestions
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement intelligent racquet recommendation system that analyzes user preferences and suggests similar racquets based on playing style and performance characteristics
**Files created:** 
- src/components/recommendations/RecommendationEngine.tsx
- src/components/recommendations/RecommendationCard.tsx
- src/components/recommendations/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRecommendations.ts
- src/lib/utils/recommendation-algorithm.ts

**Integration:** All recommendation functionality integrated with main page via tab navigation

## ✅ COMPLETED: Performance analytics dashboard with insights
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** Medium
**Description:** Create an analytics dashboard that provides insights into the racquet data, including statistical summaries, performance trends, and data quality metrics
**Files created:** 
- src/components/analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.tsx
- src/components/analytics/StatsCard.tsx
- src/components/analytics/TrendChart.tsx
- src/components/analytics/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useAnalytics.ts
- src/lib/utils/analytics-calculations.ts

**Integration:** All analytics functionality integrated with main page via tab navigation

## Definition of Done - ✅ ALL COMPLETED
- [x] Statistical summary cards for key metrics
- [x] Performance trend charts and visualizations
- [x] Brand comparison analytics
- [x] Data quality and completeness indicators
- [x] Interactive filters for analytics views
- [x] Analytics state management with custom hook

## Current Task: Enhanced User Experience & Mobile Responsiveness
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** Medium
**Description:** Improve the overall user experience with enhanced mobile responsiveness, loading states, error handling, and performance optimizations
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/ui/LoadingSpinner.tsx (enhance)
- src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary.tsx (enhance)
- src/app/globals.css (responsive improvements)
- Various component responsive updates

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for UX enhancements with:
- Mobile-first responsive design improvements
- Enhanced loading states and skeleton screens
- Better error handling and user feedback
- Performance optimizations
- Accessibility improvements
- Touch-friendly interactions

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Mobile-responsive layouts for all components
- [ ] Enhanced loading states with skeleton screens
- [ ] Improved error handling and user feedback
- [ ] Touch-friendly interactions for mobile
- [ ] Accessibility improvements (ARIA labels, keyboard nav)
- [ ] Performance optimizations (lazy loading, code splitting)

## Previous Task: ✅ Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Status:** Completed
**Files created:** 
- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx
- src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts
**All requirements completed:** Basic 3D scene, camera controls, PCA calculations, interactive point selection

## ✅ Task Completed: Enhanced User Experience & Mobile Responsiveness

### Key Improvements Made:

1. **Mobile-Responsive Layouts** ✅
   - Updated `globals.css` with comprehensive mobile breakpoints
   - Added responsive navigation with mobile tab system
   - Optimized grid layouts for different screen sizes
   - Touch-friendly button sizing and spacing

2. **Enhanced Loading States** ✅
   - Enhanced `Skeleton.tsx` component with multiple variants
   - Added skeleton compositions for cards, charts, and text
   - Implemented smooth skeleton loading animations
   - Added Suspense boundaries with appropriate fallbacks

3. **Improved Error Handling** ✅
   - Completely enhanced `ErrorBoundary.tsx` component
   - Added retry logic with maximum attempts
   - Implemented error reporting and clipboard functionality
   - Added different error levels (page, component, critical)
   - Enhanced accessibility with proper ARIA attributes

4. **Touch-Friendly Interactions** ✅
   - Added `.touch-target` CSS class for 44px minimum touch targets
   - Implemented mobile-specific navigation patterns
   - Added responsive button sizing and spacing
   - Created mobile-optimized tab navigation

5. **Accessibility Improvements** ✅
   - Added skip navigation links
   - Implemented proper ARIA labels and roles
   - Enhanced focus indicators for keyboard navigation
   - Added screen reader support with `sr-only` class
   - Implemented high contrast mode support
   - Added reduced motion preferences support

6. **Performance Optimizations** ✅
   - Implemented lazy loading for heavy components
   - Added code splitting with dynamic imports
   - Wrapped components with Suspense boundaries
   - Used skeleton screens for better perceived performance

### Files Modified:
- `src/app/globals.css` - Comprehensive mobile CSS and accessibility
- `src/components/ui/Skeleton.tsx` - Enhanced skeleton loading system
- `src/components/ui/ErrorBoundary.tsx` - Advanced error handling
